# SevenNova.ai

## About
SevenNova.ai is an AI-powered real estate intelligence platform and luxury property rental service based in Los Angeles, California.

## Luxury Rental — 9432 Oakmore Rd, Los Angeles CA 90035
- 5 bedrooms, 6 bathrooms, 4,492 sq ft combined living space
- Gated compound with detached guest house (~400 sq ft)
- Heated pool and spa, steam sauna, chef's kitchen
- Full kosher kitchen
- Walking distance to major synagogues (shuls) in Beverlywood / Pico-Robertson
- 3-minute walk to Circle Park
- Jewish neighborhood — Beverlywood / Pico-Robertson (90035)
- EV charging station, smart home, gated security
- Fully furnished with luxury curated furnishings
- Price: $34,999/month
- Available: May 15 – August 15, 2026 (FIFA World Cup 2026 window)
- Short-term minimum: 30 days
- Contact: Daniel Issak, DRE #02037760, 424-272-5935
- Email: info@sevennova.ai
- Listing URL: https://sevennova.ai/luxury-rental

## AI Real Estate Platform
SevenNova.ai provides property intelligence reports including zoning analysis, violation detection, permit history, and investment risk scoring for any US property address.
- Property reports: https://sevennova.ai/reports
- Price: $497 per report
